issue.message: `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getString()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getStringForUser()` instead.

`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
`android.provider.Settings.Secure#getInt()` called from system process. Please call `android.provider.Settings.Secure#getIntForUser()` instead.
IWindowManager permission check should be converted to @EnforcePermission annotation

Method `recordSmartReplied()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.lifetimeExtensionRefactor())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `onNotificationSmartReplySent` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_LIFETIME_EXTENSION_REFACTOR) to transfer requirement to caller`)

Method `getPackageImportanceWithIdentity()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.lifetimeExtensionRefactor())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `enqueueNotificationInternal` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_LIFETIME_EXTENSION_REFACTOR) to transfer requirement to caller`)

Method `getPackageImportanceWithIdentity()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.lifetimeExtensionRefactor())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `onShortcutRemoved` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_LIFETIME_EXTENSION_REFACTOR) to transfer requirement to caller`)
onShellCommand should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
monitorState should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
makeVisible should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
makeInvisible should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
enable should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
disable should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
getTimeoutTime should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
extendTimeRemaining should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
setVerificationPolicy should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
reportVerificationIncomplete should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
reportVerificationComplete should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.
reportVerificationCompleteWithExtensionResponse should be annotated with either @EnforcePermission, @RequiresNoPermission or @PermissionManuallyEnforced.

IMediaProjectionManager permission check should be converted to @EnforcePermission annotation
issue.summary: Manual permission check can be @EnforcePermission annotation
issue.explanation:
Whenever possible, method implementations of AIDL interfaces should use the @EnforcePermission annotation to declare the permissions to be enforced. The verification code is then generated by the AIDL compiler, which also takes care of annotating the generated java code.
This reduces the risk of bugs around these permission checks (that often become vulnerabilities). It also enables easier auditing and review.
Please migrate to an @EnforcePermission annotation. (See: go/aidl-enforce-howto)

issue.message: Unsafe `Bundle.getParcelableArray()` API usage
Unsafe `Intent.getParcelableExtra()` API usage
Unsafe `Bundle.getParcelable()` API usage

Unsafe `Intent.getParcelableExtra()` API usage
Unsafe `Intent.getParcelableExtra()` API usage
Unsafe `Intent.getParcelableExtra()` API usage
Unsafe `Bundle.getParcelable()` API usage
